trigger_command:
git add -A && git commit -m "Fix Go version compatibility for CI — downgrade deps to Go 1.23

pdfcpu v0.11.1 required Go 1.24+, golang.org/x/image v0.38.0
required Go 1.25+. Downgraded to pdfcpu v0.9.1, x/image v0.23.0,
x/net v0.34.0, x/crypto v0.32.0, excelize v2.9.0.
Set go.mod to go 1.23.5 (matches CI runner).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push 2>&1 | tail -3
